controller.prompt: Are further adjustments required for the prosthesis?
Are further adjustments required for the screw?

cb_step_1.title: Select CT Volume
cb_step_1.instruction: Choose the CT volume for processing.

cb_step_2.title: Create Segmentation
cb_step_2.instruction: Switch to Segment Editor module and create a segmentation named 'Bone_Segmentation'.

cb_step_3.title: Add Segment
cb_step_3.instruction: Click 'Add' and rename the segment to 'Bone_Segment'.

cb_step_5.title: Adjust Threshold Range
cb_step_5.instruction: Set the threshold range for bone segmentation.

cb_step_6.title: Apply Threshold
cb_step_6.instruction: Click Apply to run the threshold effect.

cb_step_8.title: Keep Largest Island
cb_step_8.instruction: Select 'Keep largest island' from the Islands menu.

cb_step_9.title: Apply Islands
cb_step_9.instruction: Click Apply to keep the largest island.

cb_step_10.title: Select Bone Segmentation
cb_step_10.instruction: Choose the bone segmentation node from the scene.

cb_step_12.title: Create Point List
cb_step_12.instruction: Switch to Markups module and click 'Point List' to create a fiducial named 'Prosthesis_center_point'.

cb_step_13.title: Place Prosthesis Center Point
cb_step_13.instruction: Click on the glenoid cavity surface to place the center point.

cb_step_14.title: Select Center Point
cb_step_14.instruction: Choose the fiducial node for the prosthesis center point.

cb_step_16.title: Adjust Prosthesis?
cb_step_16.instruction: Choose Yes to adjust with 3D handles, or No to skip.

cb_step_17.title: Adjust Prosthesis Handles
cb_step_17.instruction: Adjust the 3D transform handles of the implanted prosthesis.

cb_step_20.title: Adjust Screw?
cb_step_20.instruction: Choose Yes to adjust the screw, or No to finish.

cb_step_21.title: Adjust Screw Paths
cb_step_21.instruction: Adjust the endpoints of the planning paths for the screw.

operation_descriptions: Create a new segmentation node named Bone_Segmentation in the Segment Editor module
Add a new segment and rename it to Bone_Segment using the segment editor Add button
Open the Threshold effect in the Segment Editor module by clicking the Threshold button
Apply the threshold effect in the Segment Editor module
Open the Islands effect in the Segment Editor module
Select the 'Keep largest island' option in the Islands effect
Apply the Islands effect in the Segment Editor module
Create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named Prosthesis_center_point using the Point List button in Markups module
Create a new segmentation node named Bone_Segmentation in the Segment Editor module
Add a new segment and rename it to Bone_Segment using the segment editor Add button
Open the Threshold effect in the Segment Editor module by clicking the Threshold button
Apply the threshold effect in the Segment Editor module
Open the Islands effect in the Segment Editor module
Select the 'Keep largest island' option in the Islands effect
Apply the Islands effect in the Segment Editor module
Trigger the 3D reconstruction of the selected bone segmentation
Create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named Prosthesis_center_point using the Point List button in Markups module
Manually click on the glenoid cavity surface to select a point for the "Prosthesis_center_point".
Manually click on the glenoid cavity surface to select a point for the "Prosthesis_center_point".
Perform prosthesis implantation using the selected fiducial point
Manually adjust the 3D transform handles.
Update the prosthesis after manual transformation adjustment
Execute the final plan for the prosthesis placement
Manually adjust the endpoints of the planning paths.
Update the screw placement after manual path adjustment

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
